caption: A screen recording shows a web browser displaying a document titled "Rural Community Food System." The page contains text and a complex circular diagram with numerous interconnected nodes and arrows. Legible text on the page includes "You can contribute to the development of this model by adding concepts by linking to existing nodes" and a references section listing "Large Corporate Farm Systems" and "Rural Community Food Systems." In the top right corner of the browser window, a small video feed shows a man with a beard wearing a dark shirt. As the video progresses, the mouse cursor moves across the screen, scrolling down the document. The page transitions from the introductory text and the top of the diagram to a lower section that includes a "Legend" at the bottom, detailing different node types such as "External Driver" and "Internal Driver." The browser's address bar and various open tabs remain visible throughout.
